Seattle's Carpentry Experts

Craftsmanship built to last. Serving Seattle and the Eastside with pride and precision for over a decade.

Call Now: +12063392813

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Built on Quality, Rooted in Seattle

Seattle's Best Carpentry started with a simple goal: provide unparalleled carpentry services to our neighbors. Frustrated with the lack of reliable, skilled carpenters in the area, we set out to build a company that homeowners could trust.

Learn More About Us
Since 2014 Established
Locally Owned

Our Carpenter Services

Crafting custom cabinets for kitchens, bathrooms, and built-in storage solutions.

Learn More →

Structural Repairs

Addressing structural issues in Seattle homes, from foundation to roof.

Learn More →

Door and Window Installations

Enhance your home's energy efficiency and curb appeal with professional door and window installations.

Siding Installation & Repair

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our carpenter services.

What type of wood is best for decks in Seattle?

Western Red Cedar is a popular choice due to its natural resistance to rot and insects. Composite decking is also a great option for low maintenance and durability.

How long does it take to build a custom deck?

The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but most decks can be completed in 1-3 weeks.

Do I need a permit to build a deck or patio?

In most cases, a permit is required for decks and patios over a certain size. We can assist you with the permitting process.

Reviews From Our Carpenter Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"We hired Seattle's Best Carpentry to build a new deck in our backyard, and we couldn't be happier with the results! The team was professional, efficient, and the quality of their work is outstanding. They helped us design a deck that perfectly fits our needs and our backyard. Highly recommend!"

Sarah M. Custom Deck

"Seattle's Best Carpentry remodeled our kitchen, and the transformation is amazing. They were very helpful in the design process and patient with our many questions. There were a couple of minor delays, but they communicated well and made sure everything was completed to our satisfaction. We love our new kitchen!"

David K. Kitchen Remodel

"I needed custom cabinets built for my home office, and Seattle's Best Carpentry did an excellent job. The cabinets are beautiful, functional, and exactly what I wanted. The team was professional, courteous, and paid attention to every detail. I would definitely hire them again."

Emily L. Custom Cabinets
